creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
PORT-FIX-NO MAINTAINER : mail/glacier

According to :

http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/ports@freebsd.org.html

the port mail/glacier has an unfetchable distfile.  After some looking around
I have found another site that has it.  The patch below reflects this change.

Fix: This diff was generated by : diff -ruN glacier glacier.new
From : /usr/ports/mail
Also at : http://www.randomnetworks.com/freebsd/prs/glacier.diff
-------------------------------------------------------------------
